title: Caiguna, Western Australia - Wikipedia
content:
### Geographic Coordinates

| Format | Latitude | Longitude |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| Degrees Minutes Seconds (DMS) | 32°16′8″S | 125°29′24″E |
| Decimal Degrees | 32.26889°S | 125.49000°E |

### Location Details on the Eyre Highway

*   **Community Type:** Small roadhouse community.
*   **Regional Location:** Located on the Eyre Highway in Western Australia on the Nullarbor Plain.
*   **Sequence:** It is the second stop east of Norseman.
*   **Road Geometry:** Situated at the eastern end of a 146.6-kilometre (91.1 mi) stretch of highway between Balladonia and Caiguna, noted as one of the longest straight stretches of road in the world.
*   **Time Zone Boundary:** The unofficial Central Western Time (CWT) starts shortly east of Caiguna, heading eastward toward the Western Australia - South Australia Border.
*   **Administrative Jurisdiction:** Shire of Dundas.
*   **Establishment Purpose:** Townsite established in 1962 to assist traffic crossing the Nullarbor for the Commonwealth Games in Perth.
*   **Roadhouse Facilities:** 
    *   John Eyre Motel.
    *   Basic caravan park.
    *   Open 24 hours (one of only three roadhouses on the Nullarbor to do so).
*   **Aviation Infrastructure:** 
    *   Landing strip located nearby.
    *   Short taxiway connecting the landing strip to the roadhouse.
    *   Historically used a VOR station in the 1960s and 1970s as a turning point for Ansett and Trans Australia Airlines flights between Perth and eastern capitals (Adelaide, Melbourne, Sydney).
*   **Nullarbor Links Golf Course:** Hosts a 310-metre (339.0 yd) par 4 golf tee.

### Proximity to Landmarks and Attractions

*   **John Baxter Memorial:** Located 10 kilometres (6.2 mi) south of the roadhouse.
*   **Readymix logo geoglyph:** Located approximately 13 kilometres (8.1 miles) north west of Caiguna.
*   **Nearby Natural Features (via tracks off Eyre Highway):**
    *   Caiguna Blowhole.
    *   Jillbunya Rockhole.
    *   Cardanumbi Rockhole.
    *   Nuytsland Nature Reserve (stretches along the coast directly south).
    *   Toolinna Cove (located south within the Nuytsland Nature Reserve).
